claim_boundary: Administrative local-mirror reconciliation only; does not add Docking geometry, binding, affinity, competition, experimental blocking, or Docking Gold evidence.

governance.future_action: Do not rerun the frozen test against canonical paths; a new version must isolate builder outputs in a temporary directory before any new freeze.
governance.prelaunch_review_wording: Historical zero-work evidence and runtime integrity passed; independent final review completed after scientific launch.

incident.root_cause: Post-freeze test invocation called the package builder, which regenerated the canonical local preregistration timestamp.
